name: Probiotic Combination [2.3 Billion] | প্রোবায়োটিক কম্বিনেশন [২.৩ বিলিয়ন] | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: It is indicated for vaginal irritation, vaginal discomfort, reduction of colonization of bad bacteria yeast in the vagina. pH protection of vagina against imbalances. Re-establishment maintenance of good bacteria in the vagina. It is also indicated for urinary tract infection.
composition: Each capsule contains 2.3 billion CFU of- Lactobacillus reuteri RC-14 Lactobacillus rhamnosus GR-1
pharmacology: A combination of Lactobacillus rhamnosus GR-1 and Lactobacillus reuteri RC-14 has been associated with support of the female urogenital tracts of teens, premenopausal and post menopausal women.
dosage_&amp;_administration: Take 1 to 2 capsules with food, preferably with breakfast daily. Or, as directed by the registered physician.
interaction: No clinically significant drug interaction has been reported.
contraindications: This capsule is contraindicated with known hypersensitivity to any component of the formulation.
side_effects: No clinically significant adverse reactions have been observed in therapeutic dosage. Probiotics are likely safe for most people.
pregnancy_&amp;_lactation: It is safe to use during pregnancy and lactation.
therapeutic_class: Herbal and Nutraceuticals, Probiotic, Vaccines, Anti-sera & Immunoglobulin
storage_conditions: Keep out of reach of the children. Keep away from direct sunlight. Store below 30 C in a dry place.
